Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 3 of the Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 (No. 28 of 1958) the Central Government hereby declares that whole of the said State to be a 'disturbed area' for a period of six months with effect from 30lh June, 2018 for the purpose of that Act. [F. No. 7/10/2003-NE-l] SATYENDRA GARG, Jt.
